unique_vulnerabilities.name: Reentrancy in withdraw()
unique_vulnerabilities.reasoning: These findings describe the external call on line 19 followed by state access on line 22, which is a classic reentrancy pattern. Both tools agree on the vulnerability type.

unique_vulnerabilities.name: Deprecated THROW usage
unique_vulnerabilities.reasoning: This finding is unrelated to reentrancy and highlights the use of a deprecated Solidity feature.

unique_vulnerabilities.name: Outdated Solidity version
unique_vulnerabilities.reasoning: Both findings highlight issues with the outdated Solidity version used in the contract.
